---
title: "Do young and older adult populations perform equivalently across different automatic face-trait judgements? Evidence for differential impacts of ageing"
authors: "Kannan, C., Jones, A. L., Towler, J., & Tree, J. J."
year: 2025
date: 2025-01-01
pub-journal: "PLOS ONE"
volume: "20(5)"
pages: "e0322165"
doi: "10.1371/journal.pone.0322165"
pdf: "assets/papers/2025/kannanetal2025.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions]
---
